rdf:Description.dc:publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft Prostat apud Joh. David Zunner, Typis Balthasaris Christophori Wustii Sen. Sumptibus Johannis David Zunneri, Typis Martini Jacqueti T. O. Weigel Imprimerie nationale, Akademie der Wissenschaften in Hamburg

rdf:Description.dcterms:hasPart: በስመ፡ ንወጥን፡ በረድኤተ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ጽሒፈ፡ ግብረተ፡ ደብተራ፡ ዘኦሪት። ነገረ፡ አዕናቍ።
መጽሐፍ፡ ፲ወ፪፡ መሰረታቲሃ፡ ለሀገር፡ ዘነጸራ፡ ዮሐንስ፡ ወንጌላዊ።
እጽሕፍ፡ ነገረ፡ አልባስ።
እጽሕፍ፡ እምነገሥተ፡ ሥርዓተ፡ መቅደስ።
እጽሕፍ፡ ነገረ፡ ሕፁፃን።
እጽሕፍ፡ ነገረ፡ ሥጋ።
Names of edible animals
Names of impure animals
Names of birds
እጽሕፍ፡ ፀዓተ፡ ነገሮሙ፡ ለነቢያት።
Names of the twelve sons of ያዕቆብ፡
እጽሕፍ፡ ነገረ፡ ጥበብ፡ ዘኦሪት፡ ወዘነቢያት።
The names and concordance of the Hebrew, Roman, Coptic, Arabic and Ethiopic months
Symbolic and other explanations of various words

Explanations of words from Proverbs, Book of Sirach, of words related to buildings, Book of Ezekiel (General record), Book of Isaiah, Book of Ezra and Nehemiah, Daniel, Book of, Book of Jeremiah, Maccabees, Book of (Vulgata), Tobit, Book of, Book of Judith, Book of Esther, Maṣḥafa kufāle, Book of Job, Biblical Books of Prophets, Psalter,
Figures of speech of the prophets
Names of Jerusalem and other cities in Palestine
Names of the sun and some stars
Names of the Devil
Names of some idols
Terms relating to institutions
On currencies and weighs
On the apostles and their families
Explanation of difficult words from the Four Gospels
Explanation of difficult words of the Senodos
Explanation of difficult words of the Pauline Epistles
Explanation of difficult words of the Gǝbra ḥawāryāt
Names of trees and other plants
On vases: ሥርዓተ፡ አቅሐ፡
On measures
On fortifications
On war weapons
On rivers, seas, etc.
Names of cities and inhabited places
Supplementary chapter with various words
On seasons
Note on the dimensions of the wall of ሰኖኦር፡ Babylon?
Symbolic explanation of the book of Book of Sirach
Literal and symbolic explanation of some words in the Books of Kings
Literal and symbolic explanation of some words in Gǝbra ḥawāryāt and other books
Symbolic explanation of some words in Pauline Epistles
Explanation of gems
On weighs
እጽሕፍ፡ ኍልቈ፡ ፊደላት።
Biographical notes on the minor prophets
Enumeration of the countries in which the apostles died
Note on the ʾAksimāros
Genealogy of the family of St Mary since Eleazar
Note on the Hebrew and Syriac languages
Enumeration of the beasts which allegorically represent the different nations
Chronology of the prophets
Chronology of Jewish history
መጽሐፈ፡ ነቢያት፡ ወፍካሬ፡ ራዕዮሙ፡
በስመ፡ እጽሕፍ፡ ሰዋስወ፡ ነገር፡ ርቱዕ፡ አሚን።
Etymological explanation of the names of the apostles
Explanation of various words
Explanation of the Hebrew names of God
Explanation of the Hebrew names of the angels
Explanation of several biblical Hebrew names
Explanation of the names of Jesus Christ
Explanation of the Hebrew, Coptic and Greek names of God and Christ
Explanation of the names of the apostles
Explanation of the names of the martyrs
Explanation of the names of the righteous
Explanation of the names of the angels
Explanation of the names of the several patriarchs
Explanation of several Greek words
Spiritual genealogy of the monks of the house of ʾEwosṭātewos
Spiritual genealogy of the monks of Dabra Libānos
Similarities and enigma of different topics of the Old Testament and New Testament
Names of the prophets and the righteous
Explanation of some Greek and Coptic words
Why Jesus attended the wedding at Cana
Names of the shepherds who adored Jesus and of the three Magi
Dimensions of the Cross
Etymological explanation of the names of the prophets and enumeration of their tribes
The two genealogies of Christ
Names of perfumes
On the ten plagues of Egypt
Calendar for the main feasts of the year
